What I've Built

Featured Projects

Real-world projects solving business problems with data and code.

01
📊
Sales Analytics Dashboard – Power BI
Analyzed hardware manufacturing sales data generating insights for finance, sales, marketing & supply chain. Built a Snowflake schema in MySQL, developed stored procedures for P&L metrics, and connected Power BI for a dynamic KPI dashboard with trend analysis and top performer reports.
Power BIMySQLDAX ETLSnowflake SchemaExcel
02
🧹
SQL Data Exploration & Cleaning
A compilation of SQL challenges across multiple domains — data loading, cleaning (Nashville Housing Data), and exploration. Completed case studies from Danny Ma's 8-week SQL Challenge covering diverse analytical scenarios.
SQLData Cleaning Data ExplorationMySQL
03
🐍
Python Data Analysis & Visualization
End-to-end data analysis pipeline — raw data cleaning, EDA to identify trends and anomalies, and compelling visual storytelling using Matplotlib and Seaborn. Applied statistical techniques to extract actionable insights from complex datasets.
PythonPandasNumPy MatplotlibSeabornEDA
04
📋
Excel Data Analysis & Comparison
Comprehensive Excel-based analysis across multiple domains. Applied advanced formulas, Pivot Tables, Pivot Charts, and data cleaning techniques including handling missing values, deduplication, and format standardization across large datasets.
ExcelPivot Tables Data CleaningVisualization

2024
Present
Design Engineer – R&D
Shotblasting Machine Manufacturing Company
Led structural design and analysis of shotblasting machines in the R&D division. Managed a team of engineers across design, planning and project execution. Handled client interactions for design requirements, coordinated across departments for smooth delivery. Leveraged SQL querying for project-critical data extraction, cost estimation, production planning and scheduling.
